---
name: Feature Request | 功能请求
about: Suggest a new feature | 建议新功能
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description | 功能描述
<!-- Clearly describe the feature you want | 清晰简洁地描述你想要的功能 -->

## Use Case | 使用场景
<!-- Describe what problem this solves or what experience it improves | 描述这个功能解决什么问题或改进什么体验 -->

## Proposed Implementation | 建议的实现方案
<!-- If you have ideas, describe how you think it should be implemented | 如果有想法，描述你认为应该如何实现 -->

## Alternatives | 替代方案
<!-- Describe alternative solutions you've considered | 描述你考虑过的其他替代方案 -->

## Additional Information | 额外信息
<!-- Any other relevant information, screenshots, or examples | 其他相关信息、截图或示例 -->
